_comment: Simulated Jira / PagerDuty connector rows surfaced through Tools (Copilot connector). '_table' suffix => citation kind 'oncall'; rows carry a 'description' field for nice citation titles. Round-trips on fetch/create/update like any Tools table. Rows are acl='all' (operational).
